ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area.

startPrompt.name: Start prompt
startPrompt.description: Overlay prompt shown before the first launch, telling the visitor how to fire the ball.

levelToast.name: Level toast
levelToast.description: Brief toast shown when a new wall drops in.

winTitle.name: Verified screen title
winTitle.description: End-screen headline shown when the wall is cleared and the captcha is satisfied.

winBody.name: Verified screen body
winBody.description: End-screen body shown on a win; tells the visitor they may keep playing.

keepPlaying.name: Keep playing button
keepPlaying.description: Label for the button on the win screen that continues into untimed bonus levels.

loseTitle.name: Round over title
loseTitle.description: End-screen headline shown when the visitor runs out of lives or time.

loseBody.name: Round over body
loseBody.description: End-screen body shown on a loss; tells the visitor to try again to verify.

tryAgain.name: Try again button
tryAgain.description: Label for the button on the lose screen that restarts the round.

loading.name: Loading label
loading.description: Boot loading label shown while the game starts up.

announceLaunch.name: Announcer: ball launched
announceLaunch.description: Live-region message when the ball is fired off the paddle.

announceLevel.name: Announcer: new level
announceLevel.description: Live-region message when a new wall appears.

announceLifeLost.name: Announcer: life lost
announceLifeLost.description: Live-region message when a life is lost, with the count of lives remaining.

announceVerified.name: Announcer: verified
announceVerified.description: Live-region message when the wall is cleared and the captcha is satisfied; encourages continuing.

announceLose.name: Announcer: round over
announceLose.description: Live-region message when the round ends without verifying.

secondsShort.name: Seconds unit
secondsShort.description: Short unit suffix appended to the HUD countdown number, e.g. 30s.

English.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Bounce the ball off the paddle to smash every brick before time runs out.
English.startPrompt: Tap or press Space to launch
English.winBody: Wall cleared. You can keep playing.
English.announceVerified: Verified. Wall cleared. You can keep playing.
English.announceLose: Round over. Try again to verify.

Chinese (Simplified).ariaGame: 砖块大战。用挡板把球弹起，在时间结束前打掉每一块砖。
Chinese (Simplified).winBody: 砖墙已清空，你可以继续玩。
Chinese (Simplified).announceLifeLost: 失去一条命，还剩 {lives} 条。
Chinese (Simplified).announceVerified: 已通过。砖墙已清空，你可以继续玩。
Chinese (Simplified).announceLose: 本回合结束。再试一次以完成验证。

Spanish.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Rebota la bola con la paleta y rompe todos los ladrillos antes de que se acabe el tiempo.
Spanish.startPrompt: Toca o pulsa Espacio para lanzar
Spanish.announceVerified: Verificado. Muro despejado. Puedes seguir jugando.
Spanish.announceLose: Ronda terminada. Inténtalo de nuevo para verificar.

Arabic.ariaGame: تحطيم الجدار. ارتد الكرة عن المضرب وحطم كل قالب قبل نفاد الوقت.
Arabic.winBody: تم تحطيم الجدار. يمكنك مواصلة اللعب.
Arabic.announceVerified: تم التحقق. تم تحطيم الجدار. يمكنك مواصلة اللعب.
Arabic.announceLose: انتهت الجولة. أعد المحاولة لإتمام التحقق.

Portuguese.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Rebata a bola com a raquete e quebre todos os tijolos antes do tempo acabar.
Portuguese.startPrompt: Toque ou pressione Espaço para lançar
Portuguese.winBody: Muro destruído. Você pode continuar jogando.
Portuguese.announceVerified: Verificado. Muro destruído. Você pode continuar jogando.
Portuguese.announceLose: Rodada encerrada. Tente de novo para verificar.

French.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Renvoyez la balle avec la raquette et cassez toutes les briques avant la fin du temps.
French.startPrompt: Touchez ou appuyez sur Espace pour lancer
French.winBody: Mur détruit. Vous pouvez continuer à jouer.
French.announceVerified: Vérifié. Mur détruit. Vous pouvez continuer à jouer.
French.announceLose: Manche terminée. Réessayez pour vous vérifier.

German.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Lass den Ball vom Schläger abprallen und zerschlage jeden Stein, bevor die Zeit abläuft.
German.loseBody: Versuch es noch mal zum Bestätigen.
German.announceVerified: Bestätigt. Mauer geräumt. Du kannst weiterspielen.
German.announceLose: Runde vorbei. Versuch es noch mal zum Bestätigen.

Russian.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Отбивай мяч ракеткой и разбей все кирпичи, пока не вышло время.
Russian.announceVerified: Пройдено. Стена разбита. Можно играть дальше.
Russian.announceLose: Раунд окончен. Попробуйте снова для проверки.

Japanese.ariaGame: ウォールスマッシュ。パドルでボールを打ち返し、時間切れになる前にすべてのブロックを壊そう。
Japanese.startPrompt: タップまたはスペースキーで発射
Japanese.winBody: 壁をすべて壊しました。このまま続けて遊べます。
Japanese.loseBody: もう一度挑戦して認証しましょう。
Japanese.announceLaunch: ボールを発射しました。
Japanese.announceVerified: 認証済み。壁をすべて壊しました。このまま続けて遊べます。
Japanese.announceLose: ラウンド終了。もう一度挑戦して認証しましょう。

Korean.ariaGame: 월 스매시. 패들로 공을 튕겨 시간이 끝나기 전에 모든 벽돌을 부수세요.
Korean.winBody: 벽을 모두 부쉈어요. 계속 플레이할 수 있어요.
Korean.announceVerified: 인증됨. 벽을 모두 부쉈어요. 계속 플레이할 수 있어요.

Indonesian.ariaGame: Wall Smash. Pantulkan bola dengan pemukul dan hancurkan semua bata sebelum waktu habis.
Indonesian.startPrompt: Ketuk atau tekan Spasi untuk meluncurkan
Indonesian.winBody: Dinding hancur. Kamu bisa terus bermain.
Indonesian.announceVerified: Terverifikasi. Dinding hancur. Kamu bisa terus bermain.
Indonesian.announceLose: Ronde selesai. Coba lagi untuk verifikasi.
